description: Voxera is a poly-repo 'workspace of repos' for an AI voice/telephony CRM aimed primarily at the German (DACH) care-insurance market. A single workspace root contains four sibling git repositories plus a shared babysitter orchestration layer in root .a5c/: voxera-command (the source-of-truth brain holding vision, brand, roadmap, FEAT/BUG specs, ADRs, and all canonical babysitter process definitions), voxera-crm (the CRM product — an Nx monorepo with a NestJS 10 + GraphQL/Pothos + Prisma 6 backend and a React 18 + Vite + Mantine frontend, integrating Twilio/Telnyx/Ultravox voice), voxera-website (an Astro 6 static-first marketing site on Cloudflare Pages with EN/DE i18n and Pages Functions), and voxera-infra (Terraform 1.9.8 IaC targeting GCP via Cloud Foundation Fabric modules). Code repos reference voxera-command by relative path and never fork its content; specs drive all work and real decisions are captured as ADRs.

goals.description: Ship features faster across the CRM and website by leaning on spec-driven babysitter implementation runs (FEAT-xxx/BUG-xxx) and removing review/merge friction.
Raise code quality, especially in high-churn CRM areas (Prospects/Pipelines/Leads frontend), by decomposing god components and extracting shared abstractions.
Tame data-layer friction by making the recurring ZModel->Prisma migration workflow reliable and reproducible so schema changes stop breaking and needing re-fixes.
Keep strategy and docs in sync: maintain vision/brand/roadmap plus ADRs in voxera-command as the single source of truth, referenced (never forked) by code repos.

languages.name: TypeScript
languages.role: Primary: CRM backend (NestJS), frontend (React), website Astro/Functions, shared libs

languages.name: GraphQL (SDL)
languages.role: CRM API contract (schema.graphql), generated from Pothos

frameworks.name: Apollo Server 4 + Pothos (code-first, custom nestjs-pothos drivers)

databases.name: PostgreSQL (+ pgvector)
databases.type: Primary relational DB (CRM via Prisma; docker-compose test; GCP Cloud SQL). PGlite for in-memory test.

databases.name: Cloudflare KV (BETA_KV)
databases.type: Edge KV for beta-signup dedup / rate limiting (website)

databases.name: Google Cloud Storage
databases.type: Object storage: Terraform remote state + app file storage

infrastructure.name: Google Cloud Platform
infrastructure.category: Primary cloud (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Secret Manager, Artifact Registry, GCS); region europe-west3 (Frankfurt, DACH residency)

infrastructure.name: Terraform + Cloud Foundation Fabric v34.1.0
infrastructure.category: IaC; bootstrap + per-env; GCS remote state

packageManagers: npm (all JS/TS repos; CRM uses Nx)

architecture.pattern: Poly-repo 'workspace of repos'. A single workspace root contains four sibling repositories (each its own git repo) plus a shared babysitter orchestration layer in root .a5c/. voxera-command is the source-of-truth brain (docs, ADRs, canonical babysitter process definitions); code repos reference it by relative path and never fork its content.

modules.name: voxera-command
modules.description: Source of truth: vision, brand, roadmap, FEAT-xxx/BUG-xxx specs, architecture docs, ADRs (decisions/), operations, and all canonical babysitter process definitions (.a5c/processes/). Markdown-heavy; no application code.

modules.name: voxera-crm
modules.description: CRM product. Nx monorepo: apps/backend (NestJS 10 + GraphQL via Pothos/Apollo + Prisma 6/PostgreSQL) and apps/frontend (React 18 + Vite + Mantine + Redux Toolkit + urql). Shared libs/. Voice: Twilio, Telnyx, Ultravox. Depends on voxera-command.

modules.name: voxera-website
modules.description: Marketing site. Astro 6 static-first on Cloudflare Pages; dynamic JSON endpoints as Pages Functions (contact, beta-signup, SendGrid, Turnstile). EN/DE i18n via public/i18n.json. Depends on voxera-command.

modules.name: voxera-infra
modules.description: IaC. Terraform 1.9.8 targeting GCP via Cloud Foundation Fabric modules (v34.1.0). bootstrap/ creates project + GCS remote-state bucket; environments/dev/ composes project, APIs, service accounts.

modules.name: .a5c
modules.description: Shared babysitter runtime at workspace root (@a5c-ai/babysitter-sdk ^0.0.187). Holds runs/, cache/, logs/. Process definitions are canonical in voxera-command/.a5c/processes/.

architecture.dataFlow: Specs originate in voxera-command/docs (FEAT/BUG/ADR). A babysitter run is invoked from a code repo pointing at a spec path + a process in voxera-command/.a5c/processes; journals land in the invoking repo's .a5c while process defs stay canonical. In the CRM, Prisma schema is the data-model source of truth -> Prisma client + Pothos types -> NestJS resolvers/services expose GraphQL -> frontend consumes via codegen + urql. PostgreSQL is the DB; Redis/BullMQ handle jobs; a transactional outbox drives async events. Website is static Astro on Cloudflare Pages; forms hit Pages Functions calling SendGrid (Turnstile + KV rate-limit). Terraform/GCP provisions runtime (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Secret Manager) with state in GCS.

workflows.name: Babysitter vision/brand/roadmap iteration
workflows.description: Strategy docs in voxera-command/docs iterated via babysitter processes. Canonical, never forked.

workflows.name: Babysitter feature implementation
workflows.description: FEAT-xxx specs drive implementation in product repos.

workflows.name: Git branch + PR workflow
workflows.description: Default branch master/main. PRs run PR Checks; pushes to master run Master Checks. No CODEOWNERS/branch-protection file found. Branch off default before committing; commit/push only when asked.

workflows.name: Website deploy (Cloudflare Pages)
workflows.description: Astro build then wrangler pages deploy; no GitHub Actions in website repo (Cloudflare Pages git integration or manual wrangler). Auto-deploys on push to main.
steps: astro build && wrangler pages deploy dist

workflows.name: Terraform infra workflow
workflows.description: Bootstrap creates ops project + GCS state bucket + Terraform SA; per-env (dev) uses GCS remote state. No infra CI pipeline present.

naming.specs: FEAT-xxx-<slug>.md / BUG-xxx-<slug>.md (3-digit, permanent numbers) with templates
naming.nxProjects: 'backend' and 'frontend' under apps/; reusable code in libs/
naming.websiteRoutes: Astro file-based src/pages; Pages Functions functions/api/<name>.ts; private helpers underscore-prefixed
naming.branches: voxera-crm uses two coexisting schemes: developer-prefixed 'rm/<topic>' and issue-number-prefixed '<issue#>-<kebab-description>'; voxera-website uses 'site/<topic>'

git.model: Versioning = git. One canonical file per doc; freeze milestones with annotated tags (e.g. vision-v2), never *-final.md copies.
git.frontmatter: Canonical docs carry frontmatter (version, status, updated) + a changelog block
git.commitFooter: Commits end with Co-Authored-By trailer; PR bodies end with Generated-with-Claude-Code line; branch off default before committing; commit/push only when asked
git.deployGates: babysitter alwaysBreakOn includes 'deploy'; website auto-deploys on push to main via Cloudflare Pages
git.observedPractice: PR-merge-driven in voxera-crm (~73/300 subjects carry (#NNN)); issue number encoded in branch + subject; mostly free-form imperative subjects (Conventional Commits rare); no Co-Authored-By trailers observed historically; no release tags in any repo (main treated as continuously deployed)

codeStyle.crm: Prettier (singleQuote) + ESLint (airbnb-typescript + mantine); Nx enforce-module-boundaries as error; stylelint-config-standard-scss; Node v22 (.nvmrc)
codeStyle.backendArchitecture: GraphQL-first, code-first Pothos; repository/service/resolver layering; business logic out of resolvers; respect NestJS module boundaries (docs/patterns/)
codeStyle.frontendArchitecture: Reuse Mantine primitives/tokens/hooks first; every screen handles loading/empty/error/permission states; no new state pattern without plan approval
codeStyle.website: ESLint 9 flat (typescript-eslint + eslint-plugin-astro + jsx-a11y); single hand-written site.css with CSS custom properties (no Tailwind/CSS-in-JS); Node >=22.12
codeStyle.dryPolicy: Website pragmatic DRY: inline up to 2 similar blocks, extract at 3+ uses; shared copy in public/i18n.json

importOrder: Governed by eslint-plugin-import (airbnb-typescript) in CRM; default builtin/external then internal grouping
Nx module-boundary constraints restrict cross-project imports (apps not imported by libs)
Website: do not import from public/ in components; use astro:assets + content collections
conventions.errorHandling: CRM: @pothos/plugin-errors for typed GraphQL errors, true-myth (Result/Maybe), class-validator/zod for input validation. Website Functions: validate request shape (400 on bad input), verify Turnstile, KV rate-limit, return 500 with stable error code (never raw stack), structured console.error (no PII/secrets).
conventions.testingConventions: CRM: test-cases.md is the validation contract; every acceptance criterion maps to >=1 test. Jest+ts-jest (backend), Vitest+testing-library (frontend), Cypress (e2e), Testcontainers/PGlite (DB). Cover happy path, edge cases, authz boundaries, regressions. Tests ship with the feature in the same PR ('with tests'). A feature is not complete with failing tests. Website gate: astro check + npm run build.
additionalRules: Golden rule: Canonical strategy lives in voxera-command/docs/ — reference it, never fork it; if the website or CRM needs a product fact, read it from there. If spec and code disagree, spec wins.
Golden rule: Process definitions live once in voxera-command/.a5c/processes/; code repos invoke them by relative path, never copy.
Golden rule: Specs drive work — a feature is a FEAT-xxx.md, a bug is a BUG-xxx.md; implementation runs take a spec path as input. Do not implement from chat alone.
Golden rule: Real decisions get an ADR in voxera-command/decisions/; babysitter's run journal is execution history, ADRs are the strategic why.
Golden rule: Versioning = git — one canonical file per doc with frontmatter (version, status, updated) + changelog; freeze milestones with annotated tags, not *-final-final.md copies.
CRM SDLC gating: no production code until features/<feature-id>/status.json === PLAN_APPROVED; never skip approval checkpoints.
Prisma schema is the source of truth: change schema first, then generate migrations + GraphQL.
Website: static-first (no SSR adapter without an ADR); dynamic data via Pages Functions; islands use most restrictive client directive; never edit/commit dist/.
Website perf budget: LCP <2.0s, INP <200ms, CLS <0.05, Lighthouse >=90, <50KB JS/route; a11y WCAG 2.2 AA; brand verbs stay English in EN/DE.
Infra: pin Fabric modules (v34.1.0) and Terraform (.terraform-version 1.9.8); remote state in GCS with per-env prefixes.
German (DE) is a first-class locale; UI strings + domain forms expected translated (Pflegebox, Hausnotruf, Pflegegrade).

testing.name: astro check (typecheck; no dedicated test runner)

containerization.notes: Website (Astro) and infra (Terraform) have no Dockerfiles. CRM backend targets Cloud Run. Node version mismatch: Dockerfile node:18, CI node 20, .nvmrc v22 — worth reconciling.

services.name: PostgreSQL (+ pgvector)
services.url: postgresql (dev compose / testcontainers; GCP Cloud SQL in infra)

services.name: Google Cloud Platform
services.type: cloud (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, GCS, Secret Manager, Artifact Registry; europe-west3)

cicd.skipReason: User chose to skip CI/CD babysitter integration during onboarding; detected provider recorded for reference only.
cicd.notes: Only voxera-crm has GitHub Actions pipelines. Website deploys via Cloudflare Pages git integration; infra has no CI.

layout.bootstrap: ops project, EU GCS tf-state bucket, Terraform SA (org projectCreator + billing.user), billing budget alerts. State local until bucket id filled.
layout.environments/dev: voxera-dev project, europe-west3 (Frankfurt, DACH residency), backend_sa (logWriter/metricWriter/cloudtrace.agent/secretAccessor). GCS remote state (bucket placeholder). Workload blocks (uploads bucket, Artifact Registry, Cloud SQL Postgres 16, Secret Manager, Cloud Run v2) scaffolded but commented out pending ADRs.

infrastructure.modules: Cloud Foundation Fabric pinned v34.1.0 (project, gcs, iam-service-account, cloudsql-instance, secret-manager, cloud-run-v2, artifact-registry); modules/ dir currently empty (README only)
infrastructure.providers: hashicorp/google ~>6.10, google-beta ~>6.10, random ~>3.6; credentials via gcloud ADC (no creds in repo)
infrastructure.secretsHandling: Secret Manager slots provisioned by Terraform, values set out-of-band via gcloud; no secrets committed. CI uses dummy env values for codegen/tests.

painPoints.description: ZModel<->Prisma migration workflow is fragile; repeated 'fixed zmodel and migrations issue' commits.
painPoints.discoveredVia: git log subject mining + churn on libs/prisma-schema-backend/*
painPoints.suggestedRemediation: Make the ZModel->Prisma migration path deterministic and CI-verified: add a single canonical generate+migrate script, gate PRs on a clean 'migrate diff' (fail if schema and migrations drift), regenerate from schema.zmodel as the only source of truth, and document the workflow in voxera-crm/docs/patterns/. Targets goal-data-layer-1.

painPoints.description: Committed generated GraphQL client and lockfiles dominate diffs, undermining review.
painPoints.suggestedRemediation: Stop committing generated GraphQL client artifacts (apps/frontend/src/graphql/gql/graphql.ts, gql.ts) — gitignore them and regenerate in CI/build (the PR pipeline already runs prisma generate + GraphQL codegen). Keep schema.graphql as the only checked-in contract. Keep package-lock.json but isolate dependency bumps into their own PRs to reduce review noise. Targets goal-velocity-1.

painPoints.description: Per-product duplicated form components (JsonSchemaFormPflegebox / JsonSchemaFormHausnotrufsystem, TaskDataForm twins) edited in lockstep, signaling missing abstraction.
painPoints.suggestedRemediation: Extract a single config/schema-driven JsonSchemaForm component parameterized per insurance product (Pflegebox, Hausnotrufsystem) so domain differences live in data/config, not duplicated TSX. Targets goal-quality-1.

painPoints.description: ProspectsDetails.page.tsx is a high-churn god component (~42 touches).
painPoints.suggestedRemediation: Decompose ProspectsDetails.page.tsx into focused child components/hooks (header, activity, forms, pipeline) with isolated data fetching, reducing coupling and regression surface. Targets goal-quality-1.

painPoints.description: Dual test frameworks (Jest + Vitest) configured simultaneously in the CRM.
No release tags / versioning anywhere, contradicting the workspace golden rule to freeze milestones with annotated tags.
painPoints.discoveredVia: git tag empty in all repos vs CLAUDE.md guidance

painPoints.description: Inconsistent author identities for the same people fragment contribution stats.
painPoints.discoveredVia: git shortlog -sne shows multiple identities per person

bottlenecks.description: Generated GraphQL client files committed to repo and re-touched constantly
bottlenecks.impact: Bloats diffs, hides real changes, creates merge conflicts; inflates avg commit size
Frequent conflict surface and review noise

bottlenecks.description: Prospects detail page is a change magnet (god component)
bottlenecks.impact: Repeatedly edited single large component — coupling/regression hotspot

bottlenecks.description: ZModel/Prisma schema and migrations repeatedly broken and re-fixed
Domain JSON-schema forms duplicated per insurance product
bottlenecks.impact: Parallel near-identical files edited in lockstep — copy-paste burden

bottlenecks.description: Site-wide layout/style/i18n files concentrate website changes
bottlenecks.impact: Any copy/layout tweak reopens the same few files

repositories.name: voxera-workspace
repositories.role: Workspace root: shared babysitter orchestration layer (.a5c/ with @a5c-ai/babysitter-sdk, runs/, cache/, logs/), CLAUDE.md golden rules, README.

repositories.name: voxera-command
repositories.role: Source of truth: vision, brand, roadmap, FEAT/BUG specs, architecture docs, ADRs (decisions/), and all canonical babysitter process definitions (.a5c/processes/).

repositories.name: voxera-crm
repositories.role: CRM product code (Nx monorepo: NestJS+GraphQL/Pothos+Prisma backend, React+Vite+Mantine frontend, Twilio/Telnyx/Ultravox voice).

repositories.name: voxera-website
repositories.role: Marketing site code (Astro 6 static-first on Cloudflare Pages, EN/DE i18n, Pages Functions).

repositories.name: voxera-infra
repositories.role: Infrastructure-as-code (Terraform 1.9.8 + Cloud Foundation Fabric v34.1.0 targeting GCP, GCS remote state).

preferences.autonomyNote: This project runs in semi-autonomous mode: babysitter may proceed on routine implementation/fix steps but should break on deploys and key approval checkpoints (CRM PLAN_APPROVED gate, alwaysBreakOn includes 'deploy').
preferences.claudeMdUpdateNote: Updates to CLAUDE.md are append-only: add to a dedicated '## Babysitter' section; never rewrite or delete existing golden rules.
